per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student failed to identify any of the known issues with the AI output and instead flagged two non-existent problems.
The student demonstrated some understanding of the AI output but lacked depth and specificity in their analysis.
The student considered the original problem to some extent but did not effectively evaluate the AI output in its context.

justification: The student's inability to identify actual errors in the AI output and their lack of depth in analysis and relevance to the problem justify a grade of C
